name: Candy Cane Bread
recipeIngredient: Red and Green Food Coloring (Powdered Sugar for Icing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a cookie sheet and set aside.
2. Stir together flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
3. Cut in the margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Add the chopped nuts.
5. Combine the egg and milk.
6. Stir into the flour mixture just until moistened.
7. On a lightly floured surface, pat dough into a 10 x 7-inch rectangle.
8. Cut crosswise into 1-inch wide strips.
9. Twist each strip by holding both ends.
10. Bend one end to form a candy cane shape.
11. Place the candy canes several inches apart on the cookie sheet.
12. Bake in a 425°F oven for 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
13. Carefully remove from the wire rack and let cool.
14. Frost with decorator icing or powdered sugar icing.
Makes 10 Candy Canes.
Powdered Sugar Icing:
1. In a small bowl, combine 2 cups powdered sugar and enough milk to make a drizzling consistency (about 3 tbsp).
2. Drizzle over the cooled candy canes.
